title: EnvironmentDriver → Mirror → boundary.external propagation
caption: boundary.external.GLC(t) under two env_driver_mode=synthetic_trajectory scenarios.
simulations: linear-decline-glc-multigen (5 mM → 0 over 60 sim-min) and zero-clamp-glc-multigen (clamped at 0). Both run via baseline_time_varying_env composite with EnvironmentMirror Step landed in commit 60cdbd3.
interpretation: Proves the propagation chain driver → mirror → media_update (via boundary.external delta) → exchange_data → metabolism closes end-to-end. The mirror writes per-tick directly into each agent's boundary.external; FLUSH placement BEFORE media_update's layer guarantees same-tick visibility. Resolution of the env-store-topology-mismatch + env-driver-molecule-id-convention open_questions captured 2026-05-28.
